title: Feature/voiceforge saas
summary: Adds an entirely new 'voiceforge' example under examples/ — a multi-channel AI sales agent SaaS product with WhatsApp, voice (Twilio), email, and web chat channels, plus a Next.js dashboard and marketing landing page. All 25 files are new additions. Content is in Brazilian Portuguese. References non-existent models ('qwen3-coder-next'), non-existent integrations (baileys), and uses fabricated testimonials/metrics. No actual Mastra integration patterns are followed correctly.
maintainerNotes: This PR has significant quality issues: (1) Empty PR description — template not filled out, no checklist items checked. (2) No tests whatsoever. (3) No changeset. (4) References non-existent model providers and integrations (e.g., 'qwen' provider, 'qwen3-coder-next' model, baileys integration). (5) All UI components use hardcoded mock data with no real functionality. (6) The example is essentially a marketing landing page and static dashboard mockup for a Brazilian SaaS product, not a useful Mastra example. (7) Appears AI-generated — comprehensive but non-functional boilerplate. (8) CI tests are stuck in pending state. (9) External contributor with no prior contributions. Should likely be closed as it doesn't provide a working, instructive example of Mastra usage.
